summary: Stream 2 testing complete: Alertes capacité, S2-01 Dépendances tâches, S2-02 Vue Gantt, create_team fix, Dashboard JSX. All 7 backend tests pass, all frontend features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectGantt.jsx: useEffect dependency array uses ganttTasks.length instead of ganttTasks array — this means if tasks change content but not count, Gantt won't re-render. Minor issue, not blocking.

TaskUpdate schema: if dependencies=[] (empty list), the condition `if v is not None` in update_data keeps it as [], which is fine. But update_task filters `v is not None` but empty list [] passes through — this is correct behavior.
Dashboard loads teamsAPI.capacityAlerts() in both Layout.jsx (for sidebar badge) and Dashboard.jsx — causes 2 API calls on dashboard load. Minor performance issue.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_TaskA_dep, TEST_TaskB_dep, TEST_CycleA, TEST_CycleB, TEST_Team_Stream2 during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stream 2 features all verified: GET /api/teams/capacity-alerts returns alerts with correct fields (team_name, period, utilization_pct, level). Cycle detection returns 422. Gantt renders with frappe-gantt (8 tasks shown for Digital Workplace 2025 project). dependencies-picker appears in TaskModal. Sidebar badge shows 1 alert (rouge/critique level). Dashboard JSX is fixed and loads correctly.
